subcategory: SVG particle animation with mouse interaction
use_cases: Hero section background with floating particle effects for landing pages
Interactive visual decoration on dark-themed websites
Ambient animation for loading states or empty states
Creative background effect for SaaS product demos
Decorative animation layer for marketing websites
ai_summary: An SVG-based particle animation component that creates floating white particles on dark backgrounds using GSAP for smooth animations. The component features a custom Particle class managing object lifecycle, oscillating movement patterns, and mouse-reactive behavior with smooth interpolation. Particles spawn randomly, expand with easing animations, and fade out gracefully before self-removal. Ideal for creating ambient, interactive visual effects in hero sections or as decorative backgrounds on modern web applications.
